title: SequencePlayer
description: Play custom MIDIs in your world by naming music discs
body:
# SequencePlayer
A versatile, easy-to-use music player

**Requires [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)!**

## How to use
SequencePlayer integrates with [Online Sequencer](https://onlinesequencer.net), an free, online music-making platform. You can either create your own song using the platform, or find pre-existing songs that others have made *(make sure to acquire permission from the authors if you use their sequences on a public server!)*.

To play a sequence in-game, you may do one of two things:
- Name a music disc to the sequence ID (e.g. https://onlinesequencer.net/<this is the ID>).
- Use the `/sequence` command directly. Specify `/sequence <id>` to play a sequence, and type `/sequence` again to stop it.

This *will* connect to the Online Sequencer servers to download the sequence.

### We always accept feedback and contributions! Submit all issues, feature suggestions, and pull requests to [the GitHub repository](https://github.com/onlinesequencer/SequencePlayer).

Officially affiliated with OnlineSequencer.net
